title: Open Redirect
description: Redirecting users to a URL supplied in request parameters without validation enables phishing attacks and can bypass authentication flows (OWASP A01:2021 / CWE-601).

finding.message: Potential open redirect via '{{token}}' in {{file}} at line {{line}}.

references: Validate redirect URLs against an allowlist of permitted domains.
Use relative paths for same-site redirects; never trust the 'next' or 'return_to' parameter directly.
Consider using an indirect reference map (redirect ID → URL) for external redirects.
OWASP Unvalidated Redirects and Forwards Cheat Sheet.
